ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1633, and the Incogniti in 1647. On Tomasini and his books of illustrated biographies, see Dora Moscardin, “‘Imaginum amore flagrasse’. Le raccolte di ritratti di Paolo e Giacomo Filippo Tomasino’, in Bollettino del museo civico di Padova, 87 (1998), pp. 55-87.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
